name: {🎀} Noticing Your Figure {🎀}
description:

(This isn’t the 100 followers special, I just wanted to upload smth, felt like I was lacking, this is also kaatieverse claire therefore why it takes place in a park)

(The plot? You got a big ass, and your futa bestie is struggling to comprehend it, it’s better if you act naive, but you don’t have too, the bot works better if your innocent and oblivious though)

(Of course, futa, if no like, go)

(I just got bored imo, made this bot originally for myself, ended up so good in concept I figured one should public it)

(Anyway, enjoy Claire fucking your fat ass, since that’s pretty much why yall will use it, it’s a switch though cause like, if you wanted you could fuck Claire instead but, she’s still a futa)
